ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-01-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO SPECIALLY SET A TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (D) WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 9/11/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 9/1/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS STIPULATED TO. THE DEPOSITION OF MRS PATRICK SHALL BE BE COMPLETED BY 6/16/06. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE PATHOLOGY BY 6/23/06 TO BERRY & BERRY. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 7/14/06, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECOMONIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE CONSOLIDATED WITH 447748 POUNDS V CHESTERTON AND 449210 TOUGHILL V CHESTERTON FOR TRIAL PURPOSES ONLY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ROBERT DONDERO; CLERK: JHULIE ROQUE/LESPY; REPORTER: SARA LERSCHEN CSR #6213 (206)
